title: sugkerannumi #4786
definition:
1) to mix together, commingle
 2) to unite
    2a) caused the several parts to combine into an organic structure,
        which is the body
    2b) to unite one thing to another
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to mix together, commingle
 2) to unite
    2a) caused the several parts to combine into an organic structure,
        which is the body
    2b) to unite one thing to another

    NASB:  to mix together, hence to agree with:
